HomePage.title: Welcome to View Interior Design
HomePage.headline: Smart Interior Design Platform
HomePage.subtitle: The Future of Interior Design
HomePage.subHeadline: With a premium interface and hyper-realistic 3D experience
HomePage.description: A complete SaaS experience combining interior design, realistic rendering, instant collaboration, and a real 3ds Max plugin to export a local walkthrough running in the browser.
HomePage.heroType2: Export from 3ds Max in one click
HomePage.pluginDesc: Export your entire scene to our web platform with a single click. Analyze geometry, export materials to GLB, and automatically generate a stunning shareable web link for your clients.
HomePage.featWalkthroughDesc: Navigate smoothly through your architectural projects just like a video game using WASD and mouse controls.
HomePage.featLightingDesc: Experience physically accurate materials and reflections powered by high-resolution HDR/EXR environments.
HomePage.featCloudDesc: Powered by Supabase for instant 3D model hosting, secure auth, and real-time collaboration.
HomePage.featEditorDesc: Edit scenes directly in the browser with 3ds Max-like transform gizmos, or generate concepts with AI.

Editor.aiDesc: Describe your ideal room and let AI generate a base design.
Editor.aiPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Modern living room with warm lighting...
